description: A new enterprise customer has purchased a custom training package. A consultant must develop the curriculum.

nodes.task_description: Hold a discovery call with the customer's training lead to understand their key learning objectives and user personas.

expected_outcome.expected: Consultant gathers all necessary information to design the training.

nodes.task_description: Create a detailed curriculum outline and agenda, mapping learning objectives to specific product modules and features.

expected_outcome.expected: Consultant creates a structured and logical training plan.

nodes.task_description: Get approval from the customer on the curriculum before developing the training materials.

expected_outcome.expected: The customer and consultant are aligned on the training plan.
